overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial waterfront district at golden hour. The player moves from an open area with towering smokestacks into a dark, atmospheric underpass tunnel filled with makeshift homeless camps and burning barrels.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial waterfront path toward the distant smokestacks

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing on the walkway edge
flying vehicle (AV) passing overhead against the sky

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke against the golden sky
large multi-story industrial building with metal balconies and green facade
metal safety railing along the water edge
wide concrete industrial pathway with metal plates

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open industrial waterfront at golden hour, with towering smokestacks visible in the distance against a hazy sky. Two pedestrians stand conversing on the left as the camera approaches, and a flying vehicle passes overhead. The large industrial complex building dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel entrance with industrial piping and billboards

events.description: turns right toward the dark tunnel entrance
enters the shadow of the tunnel, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: turning right and approaching the dark tunnel entrance between industrial structures

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel opening with large industrial ventilation pipes above
large illuminated vertical billboard with purple and yellow graphics
massive cylindrical industrial tanks and piping infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right away from the waterfront, moving toward a dark tunnel entrance framed by massive industrial pipes and tanks. A large illuminated billboard becomes visible on the right as the scene transitions from bright golden hour sunlight into the shadowy tunnel mouth.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass tunnel with makeshift homeless camps

events.description: passing by a detailed makeshift camp with tents and a burning barrel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark tunnel, observing the makeshift camps and homeless encampments along the walls

notable_agents.action: man standing near a tent and plastic chair in a makeshift camp
group of people gathered near barricades and a fire barrel

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel walls and ceiling with exposed metal beams and pipes
metal barrel with open flame providing warm orange light and smoke
homeless encampment with tents, plastic chairs, and scattered debris
bright illuminated billboard with clown mascot and 'ALL FOODS' text
derelict vehicles parked along the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the dark tunnel, illuminated by sparse artificial lights and burning barrels, the camera passes through a makeshift homeless encampment. Tents, plastic chairs, and debris line the walls while people stand near fires. A bright 'ALL FOODS' billboard provides the main light source on the right wall as the camera continues deeper into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open industrial waterfront into the oppressive shadows of a subterranean underpass. It begins by gliding past pedestrians and a massive industrial complex under a hazy golden hour sky, while a flying vehicle passes overhead near towering distant smokestacks. As the camera turns away from the water, the scene shifts toward a dark tunnel entrance framed by heavy industrial pipes and tanks, with the warm sunlight fading as a large illuminated billboard appears on the right. The movement then carries the viewer deep into the shadowy tunnel, where the atmosphere transforms into a gritty encampment filled with tents, debris, and burning barrels. Finally, the camera pushes further into the underpass, guided by sparse artificial lights and the glow of a bright All Foods billboard on the wall.
